reviews.author: Daniel R., verified buyer
reviews.title: Drowned out a transatlantic flight
reviews.review_text: I wore these London to New York and barely heard the engines. Battery still showed 60% when we landed. Easily the most comfortable pair I have owned.

reviews.author: Priya N., verified buyer
reviews.title: Finally took my old pair off the desk
reviews.review_text: The adaptive mode is the standout. It softens the open-plan office without muffling my colleagues when they stop by. Pairing to two devices at once just works.

reviews.author: Marcus L., verified buyer
reviews.title: Great sound, app needs polish
reviews.review_text: Audio and call quality are excellent and the build feels premium. Knocking off one star because the companion app dropped my EQ preset twice in the first week.

reviews.author: Sofia B., verified buyer
reviews.title: Worth the upgrade from the Aria 2
reviews.review_text: Lighter on the ears and the noise cancelling is noticeably stronger on the train. I get a full work week of commutes on a single charge.
